title: Auto-payment disabled silently when Sapling params are missing
description: Trigger: Sapling params file is missing or misplaced. load_sapling_params fails, send_fn_box is set to None, tracing::warn fires. In the session, the user sees 'Send payment then type /confirm to confirm' — same as the manual-confirm path. No message distinguishes 'auto-payment unavailable because params are missing' from 'auto-payment is intentionally disabled and manual confirm is the flow'. A user with a wallet but no params file will not understand why their payment did not auto-send. Fix: if wallet_fvks.is_some() but send_fn_box.is_none(), print a visible warning in the session at connect time: 'Warning: Sapling params not found; auto-payment disabled. Copy sapling-spend.params and sapling-output.params to <params_dir>.'.
close_reason: Fixed: added eprintln\! after tracing::warn when params load fails. User now sees '[wallet] Sapling params not found at <path> ... Auto-payment is disabled. Copy sapling-spend.params and sapling-output.params there, then restart.' The tracing::warn stays for log aggregation.
